pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may fail to compile Java 17 code or handle the 'release' flag correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version that supports Java 17 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or report coverage for Java 17 classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch tests on Java 17 due to module system changes or internal API removals.
